params.TriggerDescription: Whenever CARDNAME attacks or blocks, sacrifice it unless you exile a card from your graveyard.
Whenever CARDNAME attacks or blocks, sacrifice it unless you exile a card from your graveyard.

params.Description: Threshold — As long as there are seven or more cards in your graveyard, CARDNAME gets +2/+2 and has "When CARDNAME dies, you lose 6 life."
